subject: grammar
title: Exercise — Articles (a/an/the)
instruction:
In some of these sentences there is a mistake with articles. Underline each mistake and write the correction. If the sentence is correct, tick (✓).

Example: 1 → the classical music (already shown)

questions.text: I saw a man sitting in a restaurant. A woman came and joined him, but the man got up and left without speaking to her!
Sun was shining and it was a lovely day.
I come from United Arab Emirates.
I've applied to study at the University of Edinburgh.
I usually go to work by the bus.
Sorry I'm late – car wouldn't start this morning.
I'm going to take a cruise down river Nile.
I once saw a cat wearing a pink coat and boots!
My husband collects the antiques. He's always going to auctions.
